rulings.Case Title: YES IN MY BACK YARD, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 23, 2024 line 1. PETITIONER YES IN MY BACK YARD, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT, SONJA TRAUSS AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is DENIED as moot. Respondent has submitted evidence supporting that the Applicant, Forge Development, no longer wishes to pursue the project at issue (the "Revised Project"). On January 12, 2024 the Court continued the hearing on the Amended Petition for Petitioner to submit written evidence of the Applicant's intent to pursue the Revised Project. Petitioner filed a September 14, 2023 declaration by the Applicant asserting the Applicant's desire to pursue the Revised Project. In response, Respondent submitted an October 23, 2023 declaration by the Applicant recanting the Applicant's September 14, 2023 declaration and asserting that the Applicant no longer intends to pursue the Revised Project. As a result of the supplemental evidence submitted by Respondent, the Court is now unable to grant the effectual relief that Petitioner seeks. The controversy in this matter has subsequently been mooted. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JOHN E. WAI VS. FATHI SAID ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 23, 2024 line 9. DEFENDANT FATHI SAID, VYBE LIVING, LLC, GOLDEN GATE LIVING, LLC, AT HOME SF, LLC, YAROSLAV MUDRYI, ONE49LABS LLC DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Limited Receiver And Issuance Of A Preliminary Injunction In Support Of Receivership
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 23, 2024 line 9. PLAINTIFF FELIX WAI, TWO TO FOUR, LLC, MFR APARTMENTS, LLC, GREEN HILLS VIEWS, LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A LIMITED RECEIVER AND ISSUANCE OF A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IN SUPPORT OF RECEIVERSHIP is GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: JOHN E. WAI VS. FATHI SAID ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 23, 2024 line 9. CROSS DEFENDANT FELIX WAI, TWO TO FOUR, LLC, MFR APARTMENTS, LLC, GREEN HILLS VIEWS, LLC, FELIX WAI, RUBBER DUCKING, LLC, STRUCTURE PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action 1, 4 and 5 for Cross-Complainants to allege facts in support of every element of these causes of action, including that they are residential tenants at each and every property at issue and are using each unit as their residence. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of oral and implied contact for Cross-Complaints to allege the formation of the contract; the terms of each contract; and breach of such terms. The Court does not reach any other arguments regarding this cause of action at this time, and they may be raised if necessary and proper upon the filing of the amended Cross-Complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: JOHN E. WAI VS. FATHI SAID ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Modify Tro And Appoint A Limited Purpose Receiver And For Osc Re: Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 23, 2024 line 9. PLAINTIFF FELIX WAI, TWO TO FOUR, LLC, MFR APARTMENTS, LLC, GREEN HILLS VIEWS, LLC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO MODIFY TRO AND APPOINT A LIMITED PURPOSE RECEIVER AND FOR OSC RE: CONTEMPT is GRANTED. A received shall be appointed. Parties shall meet and confer and agree on a receiver. If parties cannot agree, each party to submit 2 names of proposed receivers who are ready and willing to start the appointment immediately. The names of the proposed receivers shall be provided to the Court along with a proposed order no later than February 29, 2024. Defendant's objection to Supplemental Reply is OVERULED, The Court's January 25, 2024 order on parties' stipulation did not limit supplemental briefing to response only.
